characters.name: open/close all folders
characters.description: The main character of the series, who has many exotic animals, much to her father's discomfort. She has many wacky adventures and learns lessons along the way. Because of her adventures, she often gets into trouble. Willa is kindhearted and caring and never tries to hurt her friends' feelings. Friend to All Living Things: She must be quite the friend to animals if a bunch of them are willing to live in her house. Missing Mom: There's not enough evidence to know who Willa's mother is and it's not known if Willa's father is a divorcee or a widower.

characters.name: Willa
characters.description: The main character of the series, who has many exotic animals, much to her father's discomfort. She has many wacky adventures and learns lessons along the way. Because of her adventures, she often gets into trouble. Willa is kindhearted and caring and never tries to hurt her friends' feelings. Friend to All Living Things: She must be quite the friend to animals if a bunch of them are willing to live in her house. Missing Mom: There's not enough evidence to know who Willa's mother is and it's not known if Willa's father is a divorcee or a widower.

characters.name: Dooley
characters.description: Willa's next-door neighbour and best friend. He often gets caught up in Willa's adventures. He helps Willa learn lessons during their adventures. Smart People Wear Glasses: He wears glasses, except when it's time for bed.

characters.name: Willa's father
characters.description: Willa's single father. He is uncomfortable with the animals around the house, but knowing how Willa cares for them, he lets her keep them. He helps Willa learn lessons along the way. He apparently has a crush on Ms. Vanderwinkle. Good Parents: He loves and cares for Willa. Only One Name: His real name is never revealed.

characters.name: Sara, Kara and Lara
characters.description: Are friends (for over a year) who look, dress, and act the same and think they are cooler than everyone. Accidental Misnaming: They use the wrong names, calling Willa "Wanda/Wendy/Willetta/Wilma/Winifred/Winona" and Dooley "Danny/Dickie/Donnie/Dennis". Alpha Bitch: They often bully Willa, Dooley and Evelyn. Blonde, Brunette, Redhead: Sara is Blonde, Kara is Redhead and Lara is Brunette. Chromatic Arrangement: Sara wears red clothing, Kara wears purple clothing and Lara wears green clothing.

characters.name: Evelyn
characters.description: Fiery Redhead: She seems to be grumpy all the time and gets discouraged easily. Hair-Trigger Temper: When things do go in her way, she easily loses her temper. Jerk with a Heart of Gold: With Willa and Dooley's help, she learns to have fun and be happy. Perpetual Frowner: She rarely smiles.
